title: audit reduced-ROOT conversion for dropped non-beam trigger entries

conversion_path_audit.interpretation: sorted conversion preserves the visible h101 stream; upstream h101 production cannot be proven because no converter source or DAQ-level input is present

winner.reason: only identifiable method for constant-zero conversion-drop labels

conclusion: The sorted ROOT conversion did not drop any visible h101 entries, and the current reduced h101 mirror contains zero non-beam trigger entries. The available data do not include upstream DAQ inputs or converter source code, so filtering before root.zip remains unresolved rather than excluded.

next_tickets.title: S16i: recover HRD h101 converter provenance for trigger filtering
next_tickets.body: Locate the original HRD raw-to-h101 converter source, job logs, or DAQ run manifest and test explicitly for TRIGGER==1 selection before root.zip production. Expected information gain: resolves the remaining upstream-filter ambiguity that cannot be decided from the already beam-only h101 mirror.
